name: arcnet-model-explore
description: Exploration-only model discovery tools for ArcNet.

tools.name: list_task_types
tools.description: List known ArcNet task/usage buckets for model recommendations.

tools.name: recommend_models
tools.description: Rank candidate models for a task type. Exploration only — does not mutate agents.

tools.name: compare_replay_verdicts
tools.description: Summarize Time Machine verdict dimensions for a session (bounded).

tools.name: fetch_provider_catalog
tools.description: Return a cached snapshot (default) or live OpenAI model id list (live=true, list-only).
